---
title: redundant-test-main-exit
description: "Remove redundant os.Exit in TestMain."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Remove redundant os.Exit in TestMain. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func TestMain(m *testing.M) { os.Exit(m.Run()) }
```

## Good

```go
func TestMain(m *testing.M) { m.Run() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only redundant-test-main-exit`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
